Metadata.title: DrAgenda — Clinic management that grows with you
Metadata.description: A smart schedule with conflict prevention and a financial dashboard in a single panel. For clinics that want to grow without spreadsheets.
Metadata.ogDescription: A smart schedule with conflict prevention and a financial dashboard in a single panel.

Hero.badge: For clinics that want to grow
Hero.title: Your clinic running on <hl>autopilot</hl>.
Hero.subtitle: DrAgenda brings scheduling, doctors and finances into a single panel. Decisions based on data, not spreadsheets.

SocialProof.heading: Built for clinics that want to scale securely

items.title: Data isolated per clinic
items.body: Multi-tenant isolation right from the database.

items.title: No double booking
items.body: Guaranteed by a database constraint, not the frontend.

items.title: Financial dashboard
items.body: Revenue, appointments and performance per doctor.

ProblemSolution.eyebrow: The daily reality of running a clinic
ProblemSolution.title: You don't need another system. You need one that <hl>solves it</hl>.

items.title: Fragmented schedule
items.body: Paper, spreadsheet and calendar all separate — the front desk wastes time reconciling what belonged in one place.

items.title: Cash flow you can't see
items.body: Revenue, average ticket, income per doctor — scattered across spreadsheets no one updates at month's end.

items.title: Patients that drop off the radar
items.body: Without a central record, you only find out you lost a patient once they're already at another clinic.

ProblemSolution.closing: DrAgenda organizes all of it in a panel built for the real routine of a practice.

Features.title: What you get from day one.
Features.subtitle: Built for the real routine of a practice — not for presentation slides.

items.title: Conflict-proof schedule
items.body: Slots based on each doctor's availability and double-booking prevention guaranteed in the database — not the frontend.

items.title: Financial dashboard
items.body: Revenue, number of appointments and income per doctor in real time. No spreadsheet exports.

items.title: Availability per doctor
items.body: Each professional sets their own days and time ranges. The schedule respects them automatically.

items.title: Patient history
items.body: A complete record with contact details, appointments and care history in a single file.

items.title: Isolation per clinic
items.body: Each clinic's data stays isolated from the database up — no risk of one clinic seeing another's data.

items.title: Secure by default
items.body: Per-clinic isolation, authentication with Google or email and billing via Stripe — serious infrastructure.

steps.title: Create your clinic
steps.body: 1 minute. Email or Google. No card.

steps.title: Add doctors and hours
steps.body: Import your patient list and set up availability.

steps.title: Track it in real time
steps.body: The dashboard updates with every appointment. You decide with data, not guesswork.

DashboardDetail.title: The panel you open every morning.
DashboardDetail.subtitle: Designed to be understood in 5 seconds, even with the front desk on their feet.

items.title: Today's KPIs in real time
items.body: Revenue, appointments and confirmation rate above the fold. Decisions in seconds.

items.title: Revenue chart
items.body: See the clinic's financial health over the last 7, 30 or 90 days at a glance.

items.title: Upcoming appointments with status
items.body: Each appointment shows the patient, the responsible doctor and the current status of the visit.

Roi.title: Serious engineering, from the database to the interface.
Roi.subtitle: Every technical decision was made for clinics that need to grow without headaches.

items.title: Conflict-proof schedule
items.body: Double-booking prevention is a database constraint — it doesn't rely on frontend validation or the front desk's memory.

items.title: Real-time financial view
items.body: Revenue, number of appointments and income per doctor updated with every appointment. No spreadsheet exports.

items.title: Data isolated per clinic
items.body: Natively multi-tenant: each clinic has its own data space from the database layer. You decide what you share.

Pricing.title: A fair price. No lock-in.
Pricing.subtitle: Start free. Keep going for less than one private consultation a month.
Pricing.footnote: No lock-in · Cancel anytime. Need something tailored? <link>Talk to us</link>.

essential.name: Essential
essential.tagline: For solo practitioners and clinics ready to leave spreadsheets behind.
features: Sign in with email or Google

pro.name: Pro
pro.tagline: Automation and team management — for clinics in growth mode.
features: Roles and permissions for your team

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.tagline: For networks and multi-clinic operations at scale.

items.q: Do I need a credit card to try it?
items.a: No. You create your account with email or Google and use DrAgenda for 14 days without entering any payment details. Like it? Pick a plan afterward. Don't? Just don't continue.

items.q: I have more than one doctor at the clinic. Does it work?
items.a: It works great. Each professional has their own schedule and their own working hours, and you track everyone's performance in the dashboard — all in one place.

items.q: What if two appointments land on the same time slot?
items.a: It can't happen. DrAgenda automatically blocks the second appointment — never two patients in the same slot with the same doctor, even if two people try to book at once. No more patients waiting at the front desk by mistake.

items.q: Are my data and my patients' data safe?
items.a: Yes. Your clinic's information stays separate from any other and always travels over an encrypted connection. We're preparing the operation for Europe in line with the GDPR — you remain the owner of your data, and we only process it to make the system work for you.

items.q: Can I bring my current schedule?
items.a: You can, and we help. In the first week, our team supports you in setting up the account and registering your first doctors and patients — at no extra cost.

items.q: Can I use it on my phone, outside the practice?
items.a: Yes. DrAgenda opens right in the browser, on your computer, tablet or phone. Nothing to install — you reach your schedule wherever you are.

items.q: Is there a lock-in? Can I cancel anytime?
items.a: No lock-in and no fine print. You pay month to month and cancel whenever you want, in a few clicks. No penalty and no need to talk to anyone.

items.q: How soon can I start using it?
items.a: In minutes. You create the account, register the clinic and book the first appointment the same day — no training and no installation.

CtaFinal.title: Your next appointment could already be booked.
CtaFinal.subtitle: Start free in under 1 minute. No card. No lock-in.

Footer.tagline: The management platform for clinics that want to grow with organization, data and a human touch.
